title: More Menu
heading: Tenders
text:
# Tenders

Sort By:
Publish Date Start Date End Date

| Title | Description | Start Date | End Date | File |
| It is hereby notified for general information that e-tender is invited for settlement of 02 (Two) nos. of Foreign Liquor Warehouses under West Tripura District. | It is hereby notified for general information that e-tender is invited for settlement of 02 (Two) nos. of Foreign Liquor Warehouses under West Tripura District for the Period from 1″ April 2026 to 31 March 2027 as per Rule 155A (1) of the Tripura Excise (Fifteenth Amendment Rules), 2018 subject to certain terms and conditions through e-procurement website of the Government of Tripura . | 01/04/2026 | 31/03/2027 | |
